artifact.name: Ember Crown
artifact.origin: Forged inside the first volcanic storm where skyfire met obsidian prayer.
artifact.power: Amplifies command over infernal plasma and living flame sigils.
artifact.consequence: Each activation awakens buried war memories from the vault walls.

title: Ember Crown Unsealed: Vault Episode 1 Ignites the Fireverse
thumbnail_concept: Close-up of Ember Crown (molten filigree halo) floating above a glowing altar, with The Ashbound Witness emerging from shadowed runes, cinematic contrast, bold text: 'UNSEALED'.
director_style: Hybrid tone: slow mythic buildup to explosive activation.
episode_card:
Episode #1: Ember Crown Unsealed: Vault Episode 1 Ignites the Fireverse
Artifact: Ember Crown
Vault: Fireverse Artifact Vault
Spirit Presence: The Ashbound Witness
Hook: A sealed relic calls to the chosen hand—and the vault listens.
Cliffhanger: A hidden chamber unlocks after the Ember Crown activation signature is recorded.

spirit_entity.name: The Ashbound Witness
spirit_entity.nature: Silent ember spirit that appears as drifting cinders in humanoid form.
spirit_entity.role: Observes whether the wielder is worthy and whispers forgotten names.

narration_lines: In the silent deep of the vault, the Ember Crown is found where prayers turned to stone.
Obsidian columns breathe with memory: The vault records every activation as living memory in its obsidian columns.
A pulse answers the chamber as Amplifies command over infernal plasma and living flame sigils. stirs beneath etched sigils.
The air tightens; The Ashbound Witness appears, testing intent before release.
Then ignition—Each activation awakens buried war memories from the vault walls. as the chamber erupts in controlled cosmic fire.
When the light fades, a final echo remains: Final echoes after activation are often clues to a larger vault conspiracy.
